pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.1215 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11L transformer pairs Parallel Muon banking with LN Scale and LeakyReLU² MLP3x, then legal score-first TTT plus late QAT/GPTQ-lite int6 quantization.
techniques: Parallel Muon parameter banking with batched Newton-Schulz solve
